titleZh: 新《公司法》视角下的股东责任概览——一作为+两不作为
titleEn: An Overview of Shareholder Liability Under the New Company Law
abstractZh: 从股东责任、控制权边界和不得侵害公司及中小股东利益的角度，对新《公司法》下创始股东与控股股东风险进行实务梳理。
abstractEn: Summarizes shareholder liability, control-right boundaries, and protection of the company and minority shareholders under the revised Company Law.
